name: Original Red Velvet Cake & Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter, sugar, and eggs.
2. Make a paste of cocoa and red food coloring.
3. Add the paste to the creamed mixture.
4. Mix salt and vanilla in buttermilk and add alternately with flour.
5. Mix baking soda and vinegar separately; add last, folding in (do not beat after adding).
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
Icing:
1. Boil milk and flour together until thickened, then let cool.
2. Cream butter and sugar with vanilla.
3. Add the cooled milk and flour mixture to the icing; beat well (the longer you beat, the better).
